allow: Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 -i ~/CascadeProjects/wzp root@178.105.64.108 "echo connected; uname -a; cat /etc/os-release | head -5")

Bash(ssh -i ~/CascadeProjects/wzp root@178.105.64.108 "set -e; echo '=== docker ps ==='; docker ps; echo '=== wg show ==='; docker exec \\$\(docker ps -q --filter name=wg-easy 2>/dev/null | head -1\) wg show 2>&1 || wg show; echo '=== iptables nat ==='; iptables -t nat -S | head -30; echo '=== iptables filter FORWARD ==='; iptables -S FORWARD | head -20; echo '=== ip route ==='; ip route")

Bash(ssh -i '~/CascadeProjects/wzp' root@178.105.64.108 'CID=$\(docker ps -q --filter name=wg-easy | head -1\); echo CID=$CID; echo '\\''=== container wg show ==='\\''; docker exec $CID wg show; echo '\\''=== container wg0.conf ==='\\''; docker exec $CID cat /etc/wireguard/wg0.conf 2>/dev/null | head -40; echo '\\''=== container iptables nat ==='\\''; docker exec $CID iptables -t nat -S 2>&1 | head -30; echo '\\''=== container iptables filter ==='\\''; docker exec $CID iptables -S 2>&1 | head -30; echo '\\''=== container resolv.conf ==='\\''; docker exec $CID cat /etc/resolv.conf; echo '\\''=== container env DNS ==='\\''; docker exec $CID env | grep -i dns; echo '\\''=== check dnsmasq/resolved ==='\\''; docker exec $CID ps -ef | head -20; echo '\\''=== container ip a ==='\\''; docker exec $CID ip a 2>&1 | head -40')
